All right, so our final way of getting in touch with all of the previous members or challengers that quit or decided not to continue is going to be via phone. Okay, it doesn't have the highest returns, so we want to save that for last. But you do want to reach out to everybody because you're super excited about this irresistible offer that you don't want them to pass up on. So we have a phone script that we'll be going through and you just want to make sure that you highlight on your list of previous people, knowing them who you think would be the best for this program. And it might be a list of, let's say, anywhere from 40 to 100 people that didn't respond to your text messages or didn't respond to the email, those are the ones that you want to call because you really don't want them to miss out on this offer. So first things first, we're going to double dial and try to get them to pick up the phone. Since they do, let's take a look at the script that we'll walk through and how that works. So it's pretty similar to scripts that you've used in the past if you've done phone sales. So let's take a look at it. So you double dial, you get them the answer, or you leave a voicemail saying you have an irresistible offer and you need them to give you a callback right away before Saturday or before put some scarcity or I'm sorry, put some urgency in there. So basically it kind of works like this. So they pick up, you say, John, hey, this is Joey over at Body by Design. Or if you have a salesperson, like we had a salesperson doing this, you could say, hey, this is Sway over at Body by Design. Hey, Joey, or your owner, asked you to hit me up on someone who has been to our gym before. We have a free 21 day holiday detox, name yours, whatever you want. We're being sponsored by a nutrition company who wants testimonials for our new meal plan protocols going into the new year. Will you be down to come back to whatever your gym name is for 21 days in exchange for your before and afters in an online interview? And that's when they should say, yeah, they should be like, yeah, for free 100% free. Awesome. And that's what we say, awesome. I'll send you the application right now. So that's when you make a note that you're going to send them the opt-in link via text. Just the opt-in link. You don't need to send them anything else. But you want to close them up on the phone. So it says awesome. I'll send you the application right now. While I have you, I do want to check in and see what's motivating you. Are you trying to gain some muscle or burn belly fat? And hopefully they say both. Awesome. I see. So now we go into like a discovery portion of the script where you're like, hey, let me get some, I'm going to write down some information real quick. So what's your age? Write it down. What's your height? Write it down. What's your weight? Write it down. What's your goal weight? Or a muscle tone? Where in your body would like to see more definition? Okay. So we're looking to blank. Is that correct? And that's when you're just reiterating their goal so that they understand you guys are on the same page here. This is a great physique goal. It's absolutely worth fighting for. Just to make sure you got the right attention. I want to get a feel for your training skill level. When's the last time you trained consistently? Like three to four times per week for more than six months consistently. Okay. And they'll probably say it's been a long time. So where do you carry the most of your belly fat from backside? Great. Now is that enough to pinch or to grab a handful? Hopefully they get them doing that. This is great info. Now, would you say it's blank to blank inches that you're looking to grab a pinch in your hand? So that's when they hopefully will give an amount or you give them an amount that it is. So, okay. So this is where your fat is and where you've been struggling the most. How long have you been struggling with the fat? And then the fat is, hopefully they're still holding it in the other hand. Why haven't you taken care of it since you wanted to? And then you're, so you're really just starting to, to really build rapport with them. Now we're going to move right into the pitch. So it says awesome, you know, Bob, that makes you just like the people who are the best fit for this program. This is what we're going to do. Okay. So you might have a more casual tone if you know this person, like you totally remember them. But if you're having a salesperson do this or an admin or anybody, have them stick to the script. Right now you're blank and you want to get blank, establish where they're at, where they want to be. Our goal for you in 21 days would be approximately 12 pounds. Would you be okay with that? Is that an unreasonable goal or are you not going to be upset about that goal? And they'll be like, yeah, dude, I'm totally not going to be upset. Like heck no, that's awesome. Mind if I tell you how we're going to make that happen for you? And they'd be like, yeah, awesome. So now we're transitioning into the pitch. So here is what we need you to commit to. Can you work out at your gym three days per week? We'll coach you through everything. And they'll be like, yes, great. We got morning time slots and afternoon time slots. So what are you thinking? Morning. Awesome. Great. We'll start as early as 5am and have classes till 8pm. Can you fit yourself in there? Yeah, dude, totally. I can do that. Awesome. Okay, awesome. The nutrition will probably be similar to what you've done before with us, but with some new twists and modifications. Can you follow the meal plans? Yep, I've done them before. They're awesome. Cool. Awesome. So the program I personally will be overseeing your accountability. I actually get a bonus for everyone that loses 10 pounds. So I'll be riding your butt. Is that okay? And so that's for a sales manager or an admin or an accountability coach. If you are going to do it yourself, then just leave out that last part about the bonus. Right? So you can say, awesome. I will be personally overseeing your accountability. Is that cool? And you'll be like, yeah. Okay. So I need to schedule one of, okay, so I need to schedule your one-on-one nutrition orientations. I have times on Thursday or Saturday. That day works best for you. And then, so you want to create a little bit of scarcity. Don't say I have from now until next week every single day and time open. Be precise, be direct and say, I have this open and I have this open. Which one's going to work better for you? Okay. Time A or B. So then you look at your schedule and acuity and you see when you have it open, what time frames you actually have available. And then you'll write, I'll text you the application now. Go through it and I'll text you a confirmation when I get it. So that is when you, after you put them in your calendar, send them that link that we referenced earlier, your ClickFunnels opt-in link. Actually send that to them. So you're making the appointment in acuity yourself on the phone. But also send them the link. That way they get onto your sheet so you can track them accordingly and they fill out that woofoo form. So you have that as well. And then they just become like every other person that applied or that joined the program or opted into the program. And then you'll want to end with, Hey, PS, we have 12 spots left. So if you know anyone that might want to come in with you, let me know and I'll see if I can get them in. So this is where you, a lot of people make friends or whatever. But yeah, Bob was talking about, you know, getting into awesome. So I'll give him a call quick or let him know that I'll be calling him. I'll be reaching out to him that you just did it. So tell him that you just did this and I'll be reaching out to him and we'll get him in the 21 day challenge along with you. Is that cool? And they'd be like, yeah. So when you send them that link, just text it to them. You don't got to text the whole script. Just the link because they're expecting it. As soon as you get off the phone, text it because if you wait till you're done calling everybody for the day, like people won't be as quick to respond. So as soon as you get off the phone, text them that link, man, you can even text it to them while you're on the phone with them and be like, Hey, did you get that link? Okay, click it really quick. Awesome. Fill out your information. Cool. I'll see you on Saturday. So that's how you want to do the phone script. This is you want to reserve for anybody that didn't get back to you with the other ones, the email or the text. And hopefully after going through this script, you can get some appointments booked and you should be lining up to have a really awesome reactivation play.
